use_cases: Displaying web products or websites in a contained browser frame for demos
Creating realistic browser window mockups for presentations and landing pages
Building interactive documentation with live code previews
Showcasing portfolio work in an authentic browser environment
Teaching web development concepts with visual browser simulations
ai_summary: A browser simulator component that recreates the look of a desktop browser window with tabs, address bar, and content area. Features realistic window controls and macOS-style styling with dark gray chrome. Used for product demos, website showcases, and educational demonstrations where content needs to be displayed within an authentic browser frame.
